outline.title: Prayer and Intercession
outline.summary: Welcome to Prayer and Intercession. Deepen your prayer life and develop an intercessory ministry. Learn biblical principles of prayer, intercession, and spiritual warfare through prayer.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Deepen your prayer life and develop an intercessory ministry. This course develops your ability to pray effectively and intercede for others with power and authority.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master types of prayer and intercession. Learn spiritual warfare prayer and fasting. Develop prayer journaling and corporate intercession. Overcome hindrances and recognize answered prayer.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering foundations of prayer, types of prayer, intercessory prayer, prayer warfare, fasting and prayer, prayer journaling, prayer groups, hindrances, answered prayer, and integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and deepen your prayer life. Develop an intercessory ministry that transforms your church and community through the power of prayer.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
